lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- At the Store -- Can I have...? / How much...?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Estephano Akihito Ishii | Aula 9 -- At the Store

listenings.text: Welcome to our store! Today we have a big sale. The blue T-shirts are only twenty reais. They are very cheap! We also have new shoes for one hundred reais. The small bags are on sale for thirty reais. Do you need a new shirt? Come and buy one today. You can pay with cash or card at the counter near the door. Thank you for shopping with us!

I love shopping on Saturday morning. Today I want to buy a new shirt for work. The price is forty reais. It is not expensive, it is cheap! I need a medium size, not a large one. I have my money in my bag. I always pay with cash, not with a card. The store is small but very nice. After shopping, I go home happy.

extra_audio.text: Estephano goes to a store. He looks at a blue shirt. He asks the price. The shirt is cheap, only forty reais. He pays with cash and goes home happy.
